title: MS SQL deadlocks in business app

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Business app intermittently fails saving records
servicenow_seed.description: Several users report save failures in the inventory app. Error mentions SQL deadlock victim.

correct_steps: Confirm multiple users and exact module
Escalate to DBA with affected records and times
rationale: SQL deadlocks are database/application-side issues; help desk collects evidence.
